site_tagline: freelance web developer and designer based in Berlin
landing_intro: hi! my name is Bruno and I am passionate about building applications, visualizing data, and crafting experiences on the web.
about_p1: I'm a freelance developer with expertise spanning full-stack web development and data science. I'm based in Berlin and have a background in political science and climate policy, which informs my approach to data work.
about_p2_prefix: I build applications and visualize complex data using JavaScript/TypeScript tools
about_p2_suffix: as well as Python and R for data analysis.
about_p3: Check out my projects below to discover more about my work.
usp_title: Let me help you bring your vision to life
usp_p1: Whether you need a simple website, a complex web app, or stunning data visualizations, I'm here to help!
usp_p2: I'm an open-minded freelancer ready to help you through the entire process - from design to implementation and ongoing support.
usp_p3: Have an exciting project you would like to collaborate on? Let's chat!
contact_intro: Use the contact form or send me a message and I will be happy to further discuss your ideas with you.
form_success: Thanks! Your email has been sent
form_error: There was an error. Please send a message per email.
blog_meta: some thoughts on web development and other things
projects_meta: explore my recent works and the technologies I used to build them
seo_default_alt: logo of the website, a stylized parenthesis and the beginning of a closing tag (less than sign)
